mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sales_order(order_no, user_id, member_id, total_amount, discount_amount, paid_amount, change_amount, payment_method, remark) VALUES(#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{memberId}, #{totalAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{paidAmount}, #{changeAmount}, #{paymentMethod}, #{remark})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales_order
AND order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) AS todayOrderCount, COALESCE(SUM(paid_amount), 0) AS todaySalesAmount FROM sales_order WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND order_status = 1

SELECT o.*, u.real_name, m.account_no AS member_account_no FROM sales_order o LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON o.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN member m ON o.member_id = m.member_id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.update: UPDATE sales_order SET order_status = #{orderStatus} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
